hero.title: LeiMall - AI-Powered Global Cross-Border E-Commerce SaaS Platform
hero.subtitle: Build independent site in 3 minutes · AI full-stack operation · Sell to 200+ countries and regions
hero.governmentBar: ✦ Key Project of Chenggong Digital Town ✦ China-Laos Railway Logistics Corridor ✦ South & Southeast Asia Hub

about.title: Global Infrastructure for SMEs to Go Global
about.description1: LeiMall (leixos.com) is China's leading AI-powered cross-border e-commerce multi-tenant SaaS platform. As a key project of Kunming Chenggong Digital Town, we are committed to providing low-cost, efficient, intelligent one-stop global solutions for SMEs worldwide.
about.description2: With a plug-in microservice architecture and prepaid fund management system, we integrate global mainstream payment, logistics, and marketing resources, deeply adapting to core markets like Southeast Asia, Europe, America, and the Middle East. Leveraging Yunnan's geographical advantage as South & Southeast Asia hub and China-Laos Railway logistics corridor, we have created industry-leading Southeast Asia-specific solutions to help Chinese enterprises, especially Yunnan local enterprises, rapidly explore global markets.

hero.title: Complete Multi-Tenant Cross-Border E-Commerce Platform Architecture
hero.subtitle: Based on Shopify/Shopline leading platform architecture, 6 clearly defined layers, fully compatible with OAuth2.0 authentication + hybrid multilingual framework, building enterprise-grade one-stop cross-border e-commerce solutions

architectureOverview.title: Overall Architecture Layers
architectureOverview.subtitle: All modules are strictly divided into 6 layers, clearly defining the boundaries between 'platform shared' and 'tenant isolated' - the cornerstone for stable multi-tenant system operation

layer1.title: Open Platform & Ecosystem
layer1.description: Open APIs, application marketplace, developer ecosystem, supporting third-party apps and plugin extensions

layer2.title: Data Intelligence Layer
layer2.description: AI large models, smart recommendations, data analytics, business intelligence

layer3.title: Platform Operations Management
layer3.description: Tenant management, global control, compliance & risk control, platform operation tools

layer4.title: Tenant Business Layer
layer4.description: Store, product, order, customer, marketing, logistics, finance, data analytics

layer5.title: Consumer Layer
layer5.description: Shopping experience, user accounts, customer service & after-sales

layer6.title: Infrastructure Layer
layer6.description: IAM authentication, i18n, multi-currency, multi-tenant, API gateway, message queue, cache, object storage

infraSection.title: Infrastructure Layer

iam.title: Unified Identity & Access Management (IAM)
iam.description: OAuth2.0+JWT authorization server, unified authentication for platform/tenant/C-end users, role-based access control (RBAC), third-party login integration, token lifecycle management

iam.feature3: Third-party login support: Apple, Google, WeChat, etc.
iam.feature4: Automatic token renewal and blacklist mechanism

i18n.title: Multilingual i18n Engine

currency.title: Multi-Currency Settlement Engine

tenantEngine.title: Multi-Tenant Isolation Engine

tenantEngine.feature2: Tenant group-based isolation, no fault propagation
tenantEngine.feature4: Dedicated deployment mode for large customers

apiGateway.title: API Gateway

apiGateway.feature1: All requests must pass gateway validation

apiGateway.feature3: Smart rate limiting and circuit breaking, system stability

a1.title: LeiMall Officially Applies for Chenggong Digital Town Key Project Status
a1.excerpt: Recently, LeiMall officially submitted an application to the Kunming Chenggong District Government
a1.content1: Recently, LeiMall officially submitted an application to the Kunming Chenggong District Government to be included as a key cultivation project of the digital town. As an AI-driven cross-border e-commerce SaaS platform, LeiMall's development has received high attention from the government.
a1.content2: Chenggong Digital Town is a key digital economy industrial park built by Yunnan Province, planning to cultivate more than 100 leading digital economy enterprises within 5 years, forming a hundred-billion-yuan industrial cluster. Key cultivation projects will enjoy multiple policy dividends including tax incentives, financial support, venue support, and talent policies.
a1.content3: With advanced technical architecture, innovative business model and significant social value, LeiMall has been highly recognized by review experts. The company plans to invest 150 million yuan in the next 3 years to build cross-border e-commerce infrastructure covering South and Southeast Asia.
a1.content4: If this application is approved, LeiMall will receive key government support to accelerate product R&D and market expansion, providing high-quality overseas expansion services for more SMEs. At the same time, relying on the China-Laos Railway logistics corridor, the company will build a new digital trade channel for Southeast Asia.
a1.highlight1: Tax reduction policy: 3-year corporate income tax reduction
a1.highlight2: Financial support: Up to 10 million yuan special subsidy
a1.highlight3: Talent policy: High-end talent individual tax refund and housing subsidy

a2.title: LeiMall Southeast Asia Exclusive Solution Launches, China-Laos Railway Logistics Cost Reduced Again by 20%
a2.excerpt: Through deep cooperation with China-Laos Railway, LeiMall launches brand new Southeast Asia exclusive solution
a2.content1: Today, LeiMall officially released a new upgraded Southeast Asia exclusive solution. Through in-depth strategic cooperation with China-Laos Railway, it helps merchants reduce logistics costs by more than 20%.
a2.content2: As a landmark project of the Belt and Road Initiative, the China-Laos Railway has accumulated more than 20 million tons of goods since its opening, becoming a golden logistics channel from China to Southeast Asia. LeiMall has signed a strategic cooperation agreement with China-Laos Railway Company to obtain exclusive cabin space and preferential rates.
a2.content3: The new solution includes not only logistics lines, but also integrates Southeast Asia local payment (GrabPay, GoPay, Momo, etc.), minor language customer service, local warehousing and COD cash-on-delivery and other full services, helping merchants to expand Southeast Asian markets in one stop.
a2.content4: Data shows that Southeast Asian Internet economy is expected to reach 600 billion US dollars by 2026, making it one of the fastest growing e-commerce markets in the world. LeiMall's Southeast Asia exclusive solution will help Chinese enterprises, especially local Yunnan enterprises, to seize this historic opportunity.
a2.highlight1: China-Laos Railway exclusive logistics line, timeliness improved to 3-5 days
a2.highlight2: Comprehensive coverage of Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, Malaysia four major markets
a2.highlight3: Local payment methods such as Momo, ZaloPay, GrabPay fully connected

a3.title: China's Cross-Border E-Commerce Imports and Exports Exceed 2.3 Trillion Yuan
a3.excerpt: According to the latest data released by the General Administration of Customs, China's cross-border e-commerce imports and exports reached 2.3 trillion yuan in 2026
a3.content1: According to the latest data released by the General Administration of Customs, China's cross-border e-commerce imports and exports reached 2.3 trillion yuan in 2026, a year-on-year increase of 15.6%, continuing to maintain rapid growth.
a3.content2: Among them, export volume reached 1.55 trillion yuan, up 18.2% year-on-year; import volume reached 0.75 trillion yuan, up 10.8% year-on-year. Export growth rate is significantly higher than imports, showing the strong competitiveness of China's cross-border e-commerce exports.
a3.content3: From the market structure perspective, Southeast Asian market grew the fastest at 35% year-on-year, becoming the first emerging market for China's cross-border e-commerce exports; European and American markets maintained stable growth, up 12% year-on-year; emerging markets such as the Middle East and Latin America also performed brightly.
a3.content4: From the product structure perspective, 3C digital, home furniture, fashion apparel, beauty and personal care, sports and outdoor are the five major categories of cross-border e-commerce exports. Among them, new energy-related products (such as energy storage power supplies, outdoor power supplies) have grown particularly rapidly.
a3.highlight1: Southeast Asian market grew 35% year-on-year, ranking first in growth rate
a3.highlight2: Independent site mode proportion increased to 35%, growth rate exceeding platform sellers
a3.highlight3: AI-driven refined operation becomes new industry trend

a4.title: LeiMall AI Smart Customer Service Officially Launched, Supporting 20+ Languages
a4.excerpt: LeiMall AI smart customer service built on the latest large language model is now commercially available
a4.content1: LeiMall AI smart customer service system is now officially open to all merchants. Based on the latest large language model technology, combined with LeiMall's massive cross-border e-commerce data training, it supports automatic reply and customer consultation processing in 20+ languages.
a4.content2: The system has strong intent recognition capabilities, able to accurately understand customer consultation content (order inquiries, logistics tracking, returns and exchanges, product consultations, etc.), and provide appropriate replies. For complex issues, the system will automatically transfer to manual customer service and provide contextual information.
a4.content3: Internal test data shows that LeiMall AI smart customer service can handle more than 80% of common customer consultations, shortening first response time to within 5 seconds, customer satisfaction reaching more than 95%, significantly reducing merchants' customer service labor costs.
a4.content4: Currently, AI smart customer service is free for LeiMall professional and enterprise customers, basic edition customers can use it with pay-as-you-go. More AI capabilities such as AI product description generation, AI ad copywriting will be launched in the future.
a4.highlight1: Supports 20+ languages including English, Thai, Vietnamese, Indonesian
a4.highlight2: Handles 80% of common consultations, first response time within 5 seconds
a4.highlight3: Free for professional and enterprise customers

a5.title: Vietnam Market Insights: LeiMall Vietnam Local Payment Channels Fully Launched
a5.excerpt: LeiMall has completed docking with major Vietnam payment institutions
a5.content1: LeiMall today announced the full completion of Vietnam local payment channel docking, including mainstream e-wallets such as Momo, ZaloPay, VNPay, AirPay, as well as online banking and ATM card payment for major Vietnamese banks.
a5.content2: Vietnam is one of the fastest growing e-commerce markets in Southeast Asia, with over 70 million internet users and rapidly rising e-commerce penetration. Due to low credit card penetration, e-wallets and bank transfers are the primary payment methods for Vietnamese consumers.
a5.content3: Previously, many Chinese merchants missed out on large orders due to inability to access Vietnamese local payments. LeiMall's Vietnam local payment solution enables merchants to easily accept payments from Vietnamese consumers just like local Vietnamese enterprises, with automatic exchange rate conversion and settlement.
a5.content4: In addition to payment channels, LeiMall also provides a complete localized solution for the Vietnamese market, including Vietnamese interface, Vietnam local logistics line, Vietnam local warehousing, Vietnam SEO optimization, helping merchants develop the Vietnamese market in one stop.
a5.highlight1: Supports mainstream e-wallets such as Momo, ZaloPay, VNPay
a5.highlight2: Supports online banking and ATM card payments for major Vietnamese banks
a5.highlight3: T+3 fast settlement, supports RMB/USD withdrawal

a6.title: Cross-Border E-Commerce Compliance Guide: European VAT Declaration Complete Strategy
a6.excerpt: Detailed interpretation of EU and UK VAT declaration requirements and processes
a6.content1: For cross-border e-commerce sellers operating in European markets, VAT (value-added tax) compliance is an unavoidable important topic. Non-compliance may lead to serious consequences such as fines, goods detention, store closure.
a6.content2: EU VAT Basic Requirements: All EU internal remote sales sellers with annual sales exceeding 10,000 euros need to register and pay VAT in the destination country. Sellers using FBA or other EU local warehouses need to register regardless of sales volume.
a6.content3: UK VAT: After Brexit, the UK implements an independent VAT system with a standard rate of 20%. Sellers selling goods to UK consumers with annual sales exceeding £85,000 need to register for UK VAT. Sellers using UK local warehousing must also register.
a6.content4: IOSS One-Stop Service: To simplify VAT declaration for low-value goods (≤150 euros), the EU launched the IOSS one-stop service, allowing sellers to register IOSS in only one EU country to cover sales in all EU countries. It is recommended that all sellers operating in European markets register for IOSS.
a6.highlight1: EU annual sales over 10,000 euros or using local warehouse requires VAT registration
a6.highlight2: UK annual sales over £85,000 or using local warehouse requires VAT registration
a6.highlight3: Registering IOSS can simplify VAT declaration process for low-value goods

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Below are the most common questions from customers. If you don't find your answer, please feel free to contact us
faq.q1: Is the basic edition really free forever? What are the limitations?
faq.a1: Yes, the basic edition is free forever with no hidden fees. Main limitations include: 1 independent site, max 100 products, 5 languages, 10 currencies, 2 payment gateways. You can upgrade to the professional edition at any time to exceed these limits.
faq.q2: How is the professional edition ¥2999/month charged? Can I pay monthly?
faq.a2: Professional edition supports monthly payment (¥2999/month) or annual payment (¥28800/year, equivalent to 20% discount). New users enjoy a 14-day free trial, and billing starts after the trial period ends. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time.
faq.q3: Do you support data migration from other platforms (such as Shopify, Shopline)?
faq.a3: Yes, we support one-click migration of product, order, and customer data from mainstream e-commerce platforms (Shopify, Shopline, Youzan, Magento, etc.). Professional edition and above customers enjoy free migration service.
faq.q4: What is the custom development cycle and price for the enterprise edition?
faq.a4: Enterprise edition custom development price ranges from tens of thousands to millions of yuan depending on requirement complexity, with development cycle from 2 weeks to 6 months. Our solution consultants will first communicate in-depth with you about your needs, then provide a detailed plan and quote.
faq.q5: How is system stability guaranteed? Is data safe?
faq.a5: We are based on global infrastructure of Alibaba Cloud and AWS, with system availability reaching 99.99% (enterprise edition), providing SLA service level agreement. Data is encrypted during transmission and storage, certified by ISO 27001 and PCI DSS, with all data regularly backed up.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: LeiMall (hereinafter referred to as 'we') attaches great importance to your privacy and personal information protection. This privacy policy details how we collect, use, store, share and protect your personal information. Please read carefully and fully understand the entire content of this policy before using our products and services.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We only collect personal information within the scope necessary to provide you with services, mainly including:
collection.item1: Account information: Name, email, phone number, company name provided during account registration
collection.item2: Transaction information: Order information, payment records, logistics information, invoice information, etc.
collection.item3: Device and log information: IP address, browser type, operating system, access time, page access records
collection.item4: Usage information: Operation records, configuration preferences generated during your use of our services
collection.item5: Other information you actively provide to us: Information actively submitted through forms, emails, customer service, etc.

usage.title: How Information is Used
usage.content: The personal information we collect is mainly used for the following purposes:
usage.item1: Provide, maintain and improve our products and services
usage.item2: Account registration and identity verification, ensuring account security
usage.item3: Process orders, payments and logistics to fulfill your transaction requests
usage.item4: Send product updates, service notifications, marketing information (only with your consent)
usage.item5: Conduct data analysis and product improvement to optimize user experience
usage.item6: Detect, prevent and address security issues, fraud and violations

sharing.title: Information Sharing and Disclosure
sharing.content: We will not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only in the following cases: obtaining your explicit consent; necessary to complete services (such as payment processing, logistics delivery, these partners have strict information protection obligations); legal and regulatory requirements; legitimate requirements of government regulatory authorities.

security.title: Information Security Protection
security.content: We use industry-leading security measures to protect your personal information, including: full TLS encryption for transmission; sensitive data encrypted storage; strict internal data access permission control; regular security audits and vulnerability scanning; ISO 27001 information security management system certification; PCI DSS payment card industry data security standard certification. Although we have taken reasonable security measures, the internet environment is not 100% secure, and we will do our best to protect your information security.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: According to applicable laws and regulations, you have the following rights regarding your personal information:
rights.item1: Right of access: You can query your personal information at any time
rights.item2: Right of rectification: You can correct inaccurate or incomplete personal information
rights.item3: Right to erasure: Under certain conditions, you can request deletion of your personal information
rights.item4: Right to withdraw consent: You can withdraw consent previously given
rights.item5: Right to complaint: If you have any dissatisfaction with our privacy protection, you can complain to the regulatory authority

cookies.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience, including remembering your login status and preference settings, conducting anonymous traffic statistics and analysis, providing personalized content and recommendations. You can manage or disable cookies through browser settings, but this may affect the normal use of some functions.

changes.title: Updates to Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time to reflect changes in laws or our business practices. Major changes will be notified through website announcements, emails, etc. It is recommended that you regularly check this page for the latest privacy policy content.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions, comments or suggestions regarding this privacy policy or personal information protection, please contact us through the following methods, and we will respond to your request within 15 business days.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: Welcome to use LeiMall (hereinafter referred to as 'this service'). Before registering an account or using this service, please read the following terms of service (hereinafter referred to as 'these terms') carefully. Your registration or use constitutes your reading, understanding and agreement to accept all content of these terms. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not register or use this service.

services.title: Service Content
services.content: LeiMall is an AI-driven cross-border e-commerce SaaS platform that provides merchants with services including but not limited to:
services.item1: Independent site building and hosting services
services.item2: Product management, order management and customer management
services.item3: Payment gateway integration and settlement services
services.item4: Logistics service provider integration and order fulfillment
services.item5: Value-added services such as AI smart customer service, smart copywriting, data analysis

account.title: Account Registration and Security
account.content: You need to provide true, accurate and complete information when registering an account, and are responsible for the authenticity of the account information. You should properly safeguard account credentials (username and password) and be responsible for all activities under your account. If you find unauthorized use of your account, please notify us immediately. We are not responsible for losses caused by your failure to properly safeguard account information.

payment.title: Fees and Payments
payment.content: Regarding service fees and payment methods, the following terms apply:
payment.item1: Service fees for different packages are subject to the public announcement on our official website
payment.item2: Fees are paid in advance according to the agreed billing cycle (monthly or annual payment)
payment.item3: Except as otherwise provided by laws and regulations, paid fees are generally non-refundable
payment.item4: We reserve the right to adjust service fees according to market conditions, but will notify you 30 days in advance

conduct.title: User Code of Conduct
conduct.content: When using this service, you agree to abide by the following code of conduct:
conduct.item1: Shall not sell or disseminate illegal, infringing, counterfeit and shoddy goods
conduct.item2: Shall not engage in illegal activities such as fraud, money laundering, terrorist financing
conduct.item3: Shall not infringe on other people's intellectual property rights, privacy rights, reputation rights and other legitimate rights and interests
conduct.item4: Shall not send spam emails, conduct cyber attacks or abuse services
conduct.item5: Shall not plagiarize, decompile, reverse engineer our software
conduct.item6: Shall not conduct any operations that may damage service stability and security

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All intellectual property rights of LeiMall services (including but not limited to software, code, interface design, trademarks, logos, documents, etc.) belong to LeiMall or its rights holders. You only obtain a limited license to use this service within the scope permitted by these terms, and do not obtain any intellectual property rights transfer.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This service is provided in the status of 'as is' and 'as available'. We strive to ensure the availability and quality of the service, but make no express or implied warranties for the following matters: uninterrupted availability of service, absolute security of data, applicability for specific commercial purposes, quality and reliability of third-party services. We are not responsible for indirect losses, profit losses, business interruptions, etc.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, LeiMall and its affiliated companies, employees and partners shall not be liable for any indirect losses, incidental losses, special losses, punitive losses or consequential losses. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the total service fees you paid us in the past 12 months.

termination.title: Service Termination
termination.content: You can terminate the use of this service at any time through account settings or contacting customer service. If you seriously violate these terms, we have the right to suspend or terminate your account usage rights. After service termination, the data in your account will be processed according to our data retention policy. Refunds after paid service termination shall be implemented according to relevant refund policies.

governing.title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
governing.content: The signing, performance, interpretation and dispute resolution of these terms shall be governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Any disputes arising from or related to these terms shall be resolved through friendly negotiation between both parties; if negotiation fails, either party shall have the right to file a lawsuit with the competent people's court at the registered address of LeiMall company.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. After the terms are changed, they will be published on this page and marked with the update date. Major changes will be notified to you via email or in-product notifications. Continuing to use this service constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these terms of service, or need to report violations, please contact us at legal@leixos.com.
